query:
SELECT sr.data_scope
        FROM sys_user_roles sur
        JOIN sys_roles sr ON sur.role_id = sr.id
        WHERE sur.user_id = $1 AND sr.status = 'ACTIVE'
        ORDER BY 
            CASE sr.data_scope
                WHEN 'SELF' THEN 1
                WHEN 'DEPT' THEN 2
                WHEN 'DEPT_AND_CHILD' THEN 3
                WHEN 'CUSTOM' THEN 4
                WHEN 'ALL' THEN 5
            END
        LIMIT 1
